title: ESP32-C3 ambient light sensor
prompt: I want my ESP32-C3 to sense ambient light with a GL5528 photoresistor (LDR). Put the LDR in a divider with a fixed resistor so brighter light changes the voltage on one of the ADC pins, keeping the input inside 3.3 V. Read the light level in firmware. Use the LDR's ~10k typical resistance at moderate indoor light for the bench check.

abstraction.reason: the photoresistor is a #105 behavioral parameterized resistor (R at the tested illuminance), not a datasheet optical SPICE model
